translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The plans of the heart belong to man, but the reply of the tongue is from the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: All a man’s ways are pure in his own eyes, but his motives are weighed out by the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Commit your works to the LORD and your plans will be achieved.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD has made everything for His purpose—even the wicked for the day of disaster.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Everyone who is proud in heart is detestable to the LORD; be assured that he will not go unpunished.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: By loving devotion and faithfulness iniquity is atoned for, and by the fear of the LORD one turns aside from evil.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When a man’s ways please the LORD, He makes even the man’s enemies live at peace with him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Better a little with righteousness than great gain with injustice.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man’s heart plans his course, but the LORD determines his steps.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A divine verdict is on the lips of a king; his mouth must not betray justice.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Honest scales and balances are from the LORD; all the weights in the bag are His concern.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Wicked behavior is detestable to kings, for a throne is established through righteousness.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Righteous lips are a king’s delight, and he who speaks honestly is beloved.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The wrath of a king is a messenger of death, but a wise man will pacify it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When a king’s face brightens, there is life; his favor is like a rain cloud in spring.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: How much better to acquire wisdom than gold! To gain understanding is more desirable than silver.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The highway of the upright leads away from evil; he who guards his way protects his life.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Pride goes before destruction, and a haughty spirit before a fall.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is better to be lowly in spirit among the humble than to divide the spoil with the proud.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whoever heeds instruction will find success, and blessed is he who trusts in the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The wise in heart are called discerning, and pleasant speech promotes instruction.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Understanding is a fountain of life to its possessor, but the discipline of fools is folly.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The heart of the wise man instructs his mouth and adds persuasiveness to his lips.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Pleasant words are a honeycomb, sweet to the soul and healing to the bones.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There is a way that seems right to a man, but its end is the way of death.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A worker’s appetite works for him because his hunger drives him onward.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A worthless man digs up evil, and his speech is like a scorching fire.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A perverse man spreads dissension, and a gossip divides close friends.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A violent man entices his neighbor and leads him down a path that is not good.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who winks his eye devises perversity; he who purses his lips is bent on evil.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Gray hair is a crown of glory; it is attained along the path of righteousness.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who is slow to anger is better than a warrior, and he who controls his temper is greater than one who captures a city.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The lot is cast into the lap, but its every decision is from the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Better a dry morsel in quietness than a house full of feasting with strife.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A wise servant will rule over a disgraceful son and share his inheritance as one of the brothers.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A crucible for silver and a furnace for gold, but the LORD is the tester of hearts.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A wicked man listens to evil lips; a liar gives ear to a destructive tongue.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who mocks the poor insults their Maker; whoever gloats over calamity will not go unpunished.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Grandchildren are the crown of the aged, and the glory of a son is his father.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Eloquent words are unfit for a fool; how much worse are lying lips to a ruler!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A bribe is a charm to its giver; wherever he turns, he succeeds.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whoever conceals an offense promotes love, but he who brings it up separates friends.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A rebuke cuts into a man of discernment deeper than a hundred lashes cut into a fool.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: An evil man seeks only rebellion; a cruel messenger will be sent against him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is better to meet a bear robbed of her cubs than a fool in his folly.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If anyone returns evil for good, evil will never leave his house.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: To start a quarrel is to release a flood; so abandon the dispute before it breaks out.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Acquitting the guilty and condemning the righteous—both are detestable to the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Why should the fool have money in his hand with no intention of buying wisdom?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for adversity.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man lacking judgment strikes hands in pledge and puts up security for his neighbor.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who loves transgression loves strife; he who builds his gate high invites destruction.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The one with a perverse heart finds no good, and he whose tongue is deceitful falls into trouble.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man fathers a fool to his own grief; the father of a fool has no joy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A joyful heart is good medicine, but a broken spirit dries up the bones.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A wicked man takes a covert bribe to subvert the course of justice.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Wisdom is the focus of the discerning, but the eyes of a fool wander to the ends of the earth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A foolish son brings grief to his father and bitterness to her who bore him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is surely not good to punish the innocent or to flog a noble for his honesty.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man of knowledge restrains his words, and a man of understanding maintains a calm spirit.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Even a fool is considered wise if he keeps silent, and discerning when he holds his tongue.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who isolates himself pursues selfish desires; he rebels against all sound judgment.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A fool does not delight in understanding, but only in airing his opinions.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: With a wicked man comes contempt as well, and shame is accompanied by disgrace.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The words of a man’s mouth are deep waters; the fountain of wisdom is a bubbling brook.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Showing partiality to the wicked is not good, nor is depriving the innocent of justice.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A fool’s lips bring him strife, and his mouth invites a beating.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A fool’s mouth is his ruin, and his lips are a snare to his soul.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The words of a gossip are like choice morsels that go down into the inmost being.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whoever is slothful in his work is brother to him who destroys.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The name of the LORD is a strong tower; the righteous run to it and are safe.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A rich man’s wealth is his fortified city; it is like a high wall in his imagination.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Before his downfall a man’s heart is proud, but humility comes before honor.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who answers a matter before he hears it—this is folly and disgrace to him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The spirit of a man can endure his sickness, but who can survive a broken spirit?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The heart of the discerning acquires knowledge, and the ear of the wise seeks it out.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man’s gift opens doors for him, and brings him before great men.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The first to state his case seems right until another comes and cross-examines him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Casting the lot ends quarrels and separates strong opponents.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: An offended brother is harder to win than a fortified city, and disputes are like the bars of a castle.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: From the fruit of his mouth a man’s belly is filled; with the harvest from his lips he is satisfied.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Life and death are in the power of the tongue, and those who love it will eat its fruit.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who finds a wife finds a good thing and obtains favor from the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The poor man pleads for mercy, but the rich man answers harshly.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man of many companions may come to ruin, but there is a friend who stays closer than a brother.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Better a poor man who walks with integrity than a fool whose lips are perverse.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Even zeal is no good without knowledge, and he who hurries his footsteps misses the mark.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man’s own folly subverts his way, yet his heart rages against the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Wealth attracts many friends, but a poor man is deserted by his friend.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A false witness will not go unpunished, and one who utters lies will not escape.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Many seek the favor of the prince, and everyone is a friend of the gift giver.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: All the brothers of a poor man hate him—how much more do his friends avoid him! He may pursue them with pleading, but they are nowhere to be found.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who acquires wisdom loves himself; one who safeguards understanding will find success.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A false witness will not go unpunished, and one who pours out lies will perish.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Luxury is unseemly for a fool—how much worse for a slave to rule over princes!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man’s insight gives him patience, and his virtue is to overlook an offense.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A king’s rage is like the roar of a lion, but his favor is like dew on the grass.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A foolish son is his father’s ruin, and a quarrelsome wife is like a constant dripping.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Houses and wealth are inherited from fathers, but a prudent wife is from the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Laziness brings on deep sleep, and an idle soul will suffer hunger.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who keeps a commandment preserves his soul, but he who is careless in his ways will die.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Kindness to the poor is a loan to the LORD, and He will repay the lender.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Discipline your son, for in that there is hope; do not be party to his death.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man of great anger must pay the penalty; if you rescue him, you will have to do so again.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Listen to counsel and accept discipline, that you may be wise the rest of your days.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Many plans are in a man’s heart, but the purpose of the LORD will prevail.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The desire of a man is loving devotion; better to be poor than a liar.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The fear of the LORD leads to life, that one may rest content, without visitation from harm.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The slacker buries his hand in the dish; he will not even bring it back to his mouth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Strike a mocker, and the simple will beware; rebuke the discerning man, and he will gain knowledge.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who assaults his father or evicts his mother is a son who brings shame and disgrace.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If you cease to hear instruction, my son, you will stray from the words of knowledge.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A corrupt witness mocks justice, and a wicked mouth swallows iniquity.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Judgments are prepared for mockers, and beatings for the backs of fools.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Wine is a mocker, strong drink is a brawler, and whoever is led astray by them is not wise.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The terror of a king is like the roar of a lion; whoever provokes him forfeits his own life.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is honorable for a man to resolve a dispute, but any fool will quarrel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The slacker does not plow in season; at harvest time he looks, but nothing is there.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The intentions of a man’s heart are deep waters, but a man of understanding draws them out.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Many a man proclaims his loving devotion, but who can find a trustworthy man?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The righteous man walks with integrity; blessed are his children after him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A king who sits on a throne to judge sifts out all evil with his eyes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Who can say, “I have kept my heart pure; I am cleansed from my sin”?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Differing weights and unequal measures—both are detestable to the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Even a young man is known by his actions—whether his conduct is pure and upright.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Ears that hear and eyes that see—the LORD has made them both.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not love sleep, or you will grow poor; open your eyes, and you will have plenty of food.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Worthless, worthless!” says the buyer, but on the way out, he gloats.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There is an abundance of gold and rubies, but lips of knowledge are a rare treasure.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Take the garment of the one who posts security for a stranger; get collateral if it is for a foreigner.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Food gained by fraud is sweet to a man, but later his mouth is full of gravel.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Set plans by consultation, and wage war under sound guidance.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who reveals secrets is a constant gossip; avoid the one who babbles with his lips.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whoever curses his father or mother, his lamp will be extinguished in deepest darkness.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: An inheritance gained quickly will not be blessed in the end.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not say, “I will avenge this evil!” Wait on the LORD, and He will save you.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Unequal weights are detestable to the LORD, and dishonest scales are no good.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man’s steps are from the LORD, so how can anyone understand his own way?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is a trap for a man to dedicate something rashly, only later to reconsider his vows.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A wise king separates out the wicked and drives the threshing wheel over them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The spirit of a man is the lamp of the LORD, searching out his inmost being.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Loving devotion and faithfulness preserve a king; by these he maintains his throne.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The glory of young men is their strength, and gray hair is the splendor of the old.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Lashes and wounds scour evil, and beatings cleanse the inmost parts.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The king’s heart is a waterway in the hand of the LORD; He directs it where He pleases.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: All a man’s ways seem right to him, but the LORD weighs the heart.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: To do righteousness and justice is more desirable to the LORD than sacrifice.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Haughty eyes and a proud heart—the guides of the wicked—are sin.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The plans of the diligent bring plenty, as surely as haste leads to poverty.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Making a fortune by a lying tongue is a vanishing mist, a deadly pursuit.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The violence of the wicked will sweep them away because they refuse to do what is just.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The way of a guilty man is crooked, but the conduct of the innocent is upright.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Better to live on a corner of the roof than to share a house with a quarrelsome wife.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The soul of the wicked man craves evil; his neighbor finds no favor in his eyes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When a mocker is punished, the simple gain wisdom; and when a wise man is instructed, he acquires knowledge.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The Righteous One considers the house of the wicked and brings the wicked to ruin.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whoever shuts his ears to the cry of the poor, he too shall cry out and receive no answer.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A gift in secret soothes anger, and a covert bribe pacifies great wrath.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Justice executed is a joy to the righteous, but a terror to the workers of iniquity.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The man who strays from the path of understanding will rest in the assembly of the dead.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who loves pleasure will become poor; the one who loves wine and oil will never be rich.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The wicked become a ransom for the righteous, and the faithless for the upright.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Better to live in the desert than with a contentious and ill-tempered wife.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Precious treasures and oil are in the dwelling of the wise, but a foolish man consumes them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who pursues righteousness and loving devotion finds life, righteousness, and honor.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A wise man scales the city of the mighty and pulls down the stronghold in which they trust.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who guards his mouth and tongue keeps his soul from distress.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Mocker is the name of the proud and arrogant man—of him who acts with excessive pride.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The craving of the slacker kills him because his hands refuse to work.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: All day long he covets more, but the righteous give without restraint.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The sacrifice of the wicked is detestable—how much more so when brought with ill intent!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A lying witness will perish, but the man who listens to truth will speak forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A wicked man hardens his face, but the upright man makes his way sure.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There is no wisdom, no understanding, no counsel that can prevail against the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A horse is prepared for the day of battle, but victory is of the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A good name is more desirable than great riches; favor is better than silver and gold.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The rich and the poor have this in common: The LORD is Maker of them all.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The prudent see danger and take cover, but the simple keep going and suffer the consequences.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The rewards of humility and the fear of the LORD are wealth and honor and life.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Thorns and snares lie on the path of the perverse; he who guards his soul stays far from them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Train up a child in the way he should go, and when he is old he will not depart from it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The rich rule over the poor, and the borrower is slave to the lender.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who sows injustice will reap disaster, and the rod of his fury will be destroyed.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A generous man will be blessed, for he shares his bread with the poor.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Drive out the mocker, and conflict will depart; even quarreling and insults will cease.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who loves a pure heart and gracious lips will have the king for a friend.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The LORD’s eyes keep watch over knowledge, but He frustrates the words of the faithless.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The slacker says, “There is a lion outside! I will be slain in the streets!”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The mouth of an adulteress is a deep pit; he who is under the wrath of the LORD will fall into it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Foolishness is bound up in the heart of a child, but the rod of discipline drives it far from him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Oppressing the poor to enrich oneself or giving gifts to the rich will surely lead to poverty.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Incline your ear and hear the words of the wise—apply your mind to my knowledge—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: for it is pleasing when you keep them within you and they are constantly on your lips.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: So that your trust may be in the LORD, I instruct you today—yes, you.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Have I not written for you thirty sayings about counsel and knowledge,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: to show you true and reliable words, that you may soundly answer those who sent you?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not rob a poor man because he is poor, and do not crush the afflicted at the gate,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: for the LORD will take up their case and will plunder those who rob them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not make friends with an angry man, and do not associate with a hot-tempered man,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: or you may learn his ways and entangle yourself in a snare.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not be one who gives pledges, who puts up security for debts.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If you have nothing with which to pay, why should your bed be taken from under you?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not move an ancient boundary stone which your fathers have placed.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do you see a man skilled in his work? He will be stationed in the presence of kings; he will not stand before obscure men.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When you sit down to dine with a ruler, consider carefully what is set before you,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and put a knife to your throat if you possess a great appetite.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not crave his delicacies, for that food is deceptive.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not wear yourself out to get rich; be wise enough to restrain yourself.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When you glance at wealth, it disappears, for it makes wings for itself and flies like an eagle to the sky.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not eat the bread of a stingy man, and do not crave his delicacies;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: for he is keeping track, inwardly counting the cost. “Eat and drink,” he says to you, but his heart is not with you.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You will vomit up what little you have eaten and waste your pleasant words.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not speak to a fool, for he will despise the wisdom of your words.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not move an ancient boundary stone or encroach on the fields of the fatherless,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: for their Redeemer is strong; He will take up their case against you.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Apply your heart to instruction and your ears to words of knowledge.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not withhold discipline from a child; although you strike him with a rod, he will not die.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Strike him with a rod, and you will deliver his soul from Sheol.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My son, if your heart is wise, my own heart will indeed rejoice.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My inmost being will rejoice when your lips speak what is right.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not let your heart envy sinners, but always continue in the fear of the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For surely there is a future, and your hope will not be cut off.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Listen, my son, and be wise, and guide your heart on the right course.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not join those who drink too much wine or gorge themselves on meat.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the drunkard and the glutton will come to poverty, and drowsiness will clothe them in rags.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Listen to your father who gave you life, and do not despise your mother when she is old.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Invest in truth and never sell it—in wisdom and instruction and understanding.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The father of a righteous man will greatly rejoice, and he who fathers a wise son will delight in him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: May your father and mother be glad, and may she who gave you birth rejoice!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My son, give me your heart, and let your eyes delight in my ways.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For a prostitute is a deep pit, and an adulteress is a narrow well.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a robber she lies in wait and multiplies the faithless among men.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Who has woe? Who has sorrow? Who has contentions? Who has complaints? Who has needless wounds? Who has bloodshot eyes?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Those who linger over wine, who go to taste mixed drinks.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not gaze at wine while it is red, when it sparkles in the cup and goes down smoothly.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: In the end it bites like a snake and stings like a viper.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Your eyes will see strange things, and your mind will utter perversities.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You will be like one sleeping on the high seas or lying on the top of a mast:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “They struck me, but I feel no pain! They beat me, but I did not know it! When can I wake up to search for another drink?”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not envy wicked men or desire their company;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: for their hearts devise violence, and their lips declare trouble.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: By wisdom a house is built and by understanding it is established;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: through knowledge its rooms are filled with every precious and beautiful treasure.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A wise man is strong, and a man of knowledge enhances his strength.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Only with sound guidance should you wage war, and victory lies in a multitude of counselors.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Wisdom is too high for a fool; he does not open his mouth in the meeting place.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who plots evil will be called a schemer.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A foolish scheme is sin, and a mocker is detestable to men.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If you faint in the day of distress, how small is your strength!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Rescue those being led away to death, and restrain those stumbling toward the slaughter.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If you say, “Behold, we did not know about this,” does not He who weighs hearts consider it? Does not the One who guards your life know? Will He not repay a man according to his deeds?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Eat honey, my son, for it is good, and the honeycomb is sweet to your taste.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Know therefore that wisdom is sweet to your soul. If you find it, there is a future for you, and your hope will never be cut off.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not lie in wait, O wicked man, near the dwelling of the righteous; do not destroy his resting place.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For though a righteous man may fall seven times, he still gets up; but the wicked stumble in bad times.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not gloat when your enemy falls, and do not let your heart rejoice when he stumbles,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: or the LORD will see and disapprove, and turn His wrath away from him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not fret over evildoers, and do not be envious of the wicked.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For the evil man has no future; the lamp of the wicked will be extinguished.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: My son, fear the LORD and the king, and do not associate with the rebellious.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For they will bring sudden destruction. Who knows what ruin they can bring?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These also are sayings of the wise: To show partiality in judgment is not good.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whoever tells the guilty, “You are innocent”—peoples will curse him, and nations will denounce him;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: but it will go well with those who convict the guilty, and rich blessing will come upon them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: An honest answer given is like a kiss on the lips.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Complete your outdoor work and prepare your field; after that, you may build your house.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not testify against your neighbor without cause, and do not deceive with your lips.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not say, “I will do to him as he has done to me; I will repay the man according to his work.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I went past the field of a slacker and by the vineyard of a man lacking judgment.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Thorns had grown up everywhere, thistles had covered the ground, and the stone wall was broken down.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I observed and took it to heart; I looked and received instruction:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A little sleep, a little slumber, a little folding of the hands to rest,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and poverty will come upon you like a robber, and need like a bandit.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These are additional proverbs of Solomon, which were copied by the men of Hezekiah king of Judah:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is the glory of God to conceal a matter and the glory of kings to search it out.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As the heavens are high and the earth is deep, so the hearts of kings cannot be searched.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Remove the dross from the silver, and a vessel for a silversmith will come forth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Remove the wicked from the king’s presence, and his throne will be established in righteousness.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not exalt yourself in the presence of the king, and do not stand in the place of great men;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: for it is better that he says to you, “Come up here!” than that you should be demoted in the presence of the prince. Even what you have seen with your own eyes,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: do not bring hastily to court. Otherwise, what will you do in the end when your neighbor puts you to shame?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Argue your case with your neighbor without betraying another’s confidence,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: lest the one who hears may disgrace you, and your infamy never go away.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A word fitly spoken is like apples of gold in settings of silver.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like an earring of gold or an ornament of fine gold is a wise man’s rebuke to a listening ear.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like the cold of snow in the time of harvest is a trustworthy messenger to those who send him; he refreshes the soul of his masters.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like clouds and wind without rain is the man who boasts of gifts never given.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Through patience a ruler can be persuaded, and a gentle tongue can break a bone.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If you find honey, eat just what you need, lest you have too much and vomit it up.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Seldom set foot in your neighbor’s house, lest he grow weary and hate you.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a club or sword or sharp arrow is a man who bears false witness against his neighbor.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a broken tooth or a foot out of joint is confidence in a faithless man in time of trouble.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like one who removes a garment on a cold day or vinegar poured on a wound is one who sings songs to a heavy heart.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If your enemy is hungry, give him food to eat, and if he is thirsty, give him water to drink.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For in so doing, you will heap burning coals on his head, and the LORD will reward you.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As the north wind brings forth rain, so a backbiting tongue brings angry looks.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Better to live on a corner of the roof than to share a house with a quarrelsome wife.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like cold water to a weary soul is good news from a distant land.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a muddied spring or a polluted well is a righteous man who gives way to the wicked.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is not good to eat too much honey or to search out one’s own glory.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a city whose walls are broken down is a man who does not control his temper.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like snow in summer and rain at harvest, honor does not befit a fool.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a fluttering sparrow or darting swallow, an undeserved curse does not come to rest.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A whip for the horse, a bridle for the donkey, and a rod for the backs of fools!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not answer a fool according to his folly, or you yourself will be like him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Answer a fool according to his folly, lest he become wise in his own eyes.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like cutting off one’s own feet or drinking violence is the sending of a message by the hand of a fool.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like lame legs hanging limp is a proverb in the mouth of a fool.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like binding a stone into a sling is the giving of honor to a fool.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a thorn that falls into the hand of a drunkard is a proverb in the mouth of a fool.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like an archer who wounds at random is he who hires a fool or passerby.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As a dog returns to its vomit, so a fool repeats his folly.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do you see a man who is wise in his own eyes? There is more hope for a fool than for him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The slacker says, “A lion is in the road! A fierce lion roams the public square!”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As a door turns on its hinges, so the slacker turns on his bed.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The slacker buries his hand in the dish; it wearies him to bring it back to his mouth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The slacker is wiser in his own eyes than seven men who answer discreetly.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like one who grabs a dog by the ears is a passerby who meddles in a quarrel not his own.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a madman shooting firebrands and deadly arrows,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: so is the man who deceives his neighbor and says, “I was only joking!”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Without wood, a fire goes out; without gossip, a conflict ceases.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like charcoal for embers and wood for fire, so is a quarrelsome man for kindling strife.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The words of a gossip are like choice morsels that go down into the inmost being.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like glaze covering an earthen vessel are burning lips and a wicked heart.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A hateful man disguises himself with his speech, but he lays up deceit in his heart.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When he speaks graciously, do not believe him, for seven abominations fill his heart.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Though his hatred is concealed by deception, his wickedness will be exposed in the assembly.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who digs a pit will fall into it, and he who rolls a stone will have it roll back on him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A lying tongue hates those it crushes, and a flattering mouth causes ruin.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not boast about tomorrow, for you do not know what a day may bring.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Let another praise you, and not your own mouth—a stranger, and not your own lips.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A stone is heavy and sand is a burden, but aggravation from a fool outweighs them both.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Wrath is cruel and anger is like a flood, but who can withstand jealousy?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Better an open rebuke than love that is concealed.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The wounds of a friend are faithful, but the kisses of an enemy are deceitful.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The soul that is full loathes honey, but to a hungry soul, any bitter thing is sweet.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a bird that strays from its nest is a man who wanders from his home.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Oil and incense bring joy to the heart, and the sweetness of a friend is counsel to the soul.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not forsake your friend or your father’s friend, and do not go to your brother’s house in the day of your calamity; better a neighbor nearby than a brother far away.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Be wise, my son, and bring joy to my heart, so that I can answer him who taunts me.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The prudent see danger and take cover; but the simple keep going and pay the penalty.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Take the garment of him who posts security for a stranger; get collateral if it is for a foreigner.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If one blesses his neighbor with a loud voice early in the morning, it will be counted to him as a curse.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A constant dripping on a rainy day and a contentious woman are alike—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: restraining her is like holding back the wind or grasping oil with one’s right hand.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As iron sharpens iron, so one man sharpens another.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whoever tends a fig tree will eat its fruit, and he who looks after his master will be honored.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As water reflects the face, so the heart reflects the true man.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Sheol and Abaddon are never satisfied; so the eyes of man are never satisfied.
