translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A crucible for silver and a furnace for gold, but a man is tested by the praise accorded him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Though you grind a fool like grain with mortar and a pestle, yet his folly will not depart from him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Be sure to know the state of your flocks, and pay close attention to your herds;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: for riches are not forever, nor does a crown endure to every generation.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When hay is removed and new growth appears and the grain from the hills is gathered,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: the lambs will provide you with clothing, and the goats with the price of a field.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: You will have plenty of goats’ milk to feed you—food for your household and nourishment for your maidservants.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The wicked flee when no one pursues, but the righteous are as bold as a lion.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A land in rebellion has many rulers, but a man of understanding and knowledge maintains order.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A destitute leader who oppresses the poor is like a driving rain that leaves no food.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Those who forsake the law praise the wicked, but those who keep the law resist them.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Evil men do not understand justice, but those who seek the LORD comprehend fully.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Better a poor man who walks with integrity than a rich man whose ways are perverse.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A discerning son keeps the law, but a companion of gluttons disgraces his father.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who increases his wealth by interest and usury lays it up for one who is kind to the poor.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whoever turns his ear away from hearing the law, even his prayer is detestable.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who leads the upright along the path of evil will fall into his own pit, but the blameless will inherit what is good.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A rich man is wise in his own eyes, but a poor man with discernment sees through him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When the righteous triumph, there is great glory, but when the wicked rise, men hide themselves.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who conceals his sins will not prosper, but whoever confesses and renounces them will find mercy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Blessed is the man who is always reverent, but he who hardens his heart falls into trouble.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Like a roaring lion or a charging bear is a wicked ruler over a helpless people.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A leader who lacks judgment is also a great oppressor, but he who hates dishonest profit will prolong his days.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man burdened by bloodguilt will flee into the Pit; let no one support him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who walks with integrity will be kept safe, but whoever is perverse in his ways will suddenly fall.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The one who works his land will have plenty of food, but whoever chases fantasies will have his fill of poverty.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A faithful man will abound with blessings, but one eager to be rich will not go unpunished.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: To show partiality is not good, yet a man will do wrong for a piece of bread.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A stingy man hastens after wealth and does not know that poverty awaits him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who rebukes a man will later find more favor than one who flatters with his tongue.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who robs his father or mother, saying, “It is not wrong,” is a companion to the man who destroys.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A greedy man stirs up strife, but he who trusts in the LORD will prosper.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: He who trusts in himself is a fool, but one who walks in wisdom will be safe.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Whoever gives to the poor will not be in need, but he who hides his eyes will receive many curses.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When the wicked come to power, people hide themselves; but when they perish, the righteous flourish.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man who remains stiff-necked after much reproof will suddenly be shattered beyond recovery.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When the righteous flourish, the people rejoice, but when the wicked rule, the people groan.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man who loves wisdom brings joy to his father, but a companion of prostitutes squanders his wealth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: By justice a king brings stability to the land, but a man who exacts tribute demolishes it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man who flatters his neighbor spreads a net for his feet.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: An evil man is caught by his own sin, but a righteous one sings and rejoices.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The righteous consider the cause of the poor, but the wicked have no regard for such concerns.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Mockers inflame a city, but the wise turn away anger.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If a wise man goes to court with a fool, there will be raving and laughing with no resolution.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Men of bloodshed hate a blameless man, but the upright care for his life.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A fool vents all his anger, but a wise man holds it back.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If a ruler listens to lies, all his officials will be wicked.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The poor man and the oppressor have this in common: The LORD gives light to the eyes of both.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A king who judges the poor with fairness—his throne will be established forever.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A rod of correction imparts wisdom, but a child left to himself disgraces his mother.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When the wicked thrive, rebellion increases; but the righteous will see their downfall.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Discipline your son, and he will give you rest; he will bring delight to your soul.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Where there is no vision, the people cast off restraint; but blessed is he who keeps the Law.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A servant cannot be corrected by words alone; though he understands, he will not respond.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do you see a man who speaks in haste? There is more hope for a fool than for him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A servant pampered from his youth will bring grief in the end.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: An angry man stirs up dissension, and a hot-tempered man abounds in transgression.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A man’s pride will bring him low, but a humble spirit will obtain honor.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A partner to a thief hates his own soul; he receives the oath, but does not testify.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The fear of man is a snare, but whoever trusts in the LORD is set securely on high.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Many seek the ruler’s favor, but a man receives justice from the LORD.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: An unjust man is detestable to the righteous, and one whose way is upright is detestable to the wicked.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These are the words of Agur son of Jakeh—the burden that this man declared to Ithiel: “I am weary, O God, and worn out.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Surely I am the most ignorant of men, and I lack the understanding of a man.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: I have not learned wisdom, and I have no knowledge of the Holy One.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Who has ascended to heaven and come down? Who has gathered the wind in His hands? Who has bound up the waters in His cloak? Who has established all the ends of the earth? What is His name, and what is the name of His Son—surely you know!
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Every word of God is flawless; He is a shield to those who take refuge in Him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not add to His words, lest He rebuke you and prove you a liar.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Two things I ask of You—do not refuse me before I die:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Keep falsehood and deceitful words far from me. Give me neither poverty nor riches; feed me with the bread that is my portion.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Otherwise, I may have too much and deny You, saying, ‘Who is the LORD?’ Or I may become poor and steal, profaning the name of my God.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not slander a servant to his master, or he will curse you, and you will bear the guilt.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There is a generation of those who curse their fathers and do not bless their mothers.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There is a generation of those who are pure in their own eyes and yet unwashed of their filth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There is a generation—how haughty are their eyes and pretentious are their glances—
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: there is a generation whose teeth are swords and whose jaws are knives, devouring the oppressed from the earth and the needy from among men.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The leech has two daughters: Give and Give. There are three things that are never satisfied, four that never say, ‘Enough!’:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Sheol, the barren womb, land never satisfied with water, and fire that never says, ‘Enough!’
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: As for the eye that mocks a father and scorns obedience to a mother, may the ravens of the valley pluck it out and young vultures devour it.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There are three things too wonderful for me, four that I cannot understand:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: the way of an eagle in the sky, the way of a snake on a rock, the way of a ship at sea, and the way of a man with a maiden.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: This is the way of an adulteress: She eats and wipes her mouth and says, ‘I have done nothing wrong.’
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Under three things the earth trembles, under four it cannot bear up:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: a servant who becomes king, a fool who is filled with food,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: an unloved woman who marries, and a maidservant who supplants her mistress.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Four things on earth are small, yet they are exceedingly wise:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The ants are creatures of little strength, yet they store up their food in the summer;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: the rock badgers are creatures of little power, yet they make their homes in the rocks;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: the locusts have no king, yet they all advance in formation;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: and the lizard can be caught in one’s hands, yet it is found in the palaces of kings.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: There are three things that are stately in their stride, and four that are impressive in their walk:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: a lion, mighty among beasts, refusing to retreat before anything;
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: a strutting rooster; a he-goat; and a king with his army around him.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: If you have foolishly exalted yourself or if you have plotted evil, put your hand over your mouth.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: For as the churning of milk yields butter, and the twisting of the nose draws blood, so the stirring of anger brings forth strife.”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: These are the words of King Lemuel—the burden that his mother taught him:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: What shall I say, O my son? What, O son of my womb? What, O son of my vows?
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Do not spend your strength on women or your vigor on those who ruin kings.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: It is not for kings, O Lemuel, it is not for kings to drink wine, or for rulers to crave strong drink,
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: lest they drink and forget what is decreed, depriving all the oppressed of justice.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Give strong drink to one who is perishing, and wine to the bitter in soul.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Let him drink and forget his poverty, and remember his misery no more.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Open your mouth for those with no voice, for the cause of all the dispossessed.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Open your mouth, judge righteously, and defend the cause of the poor and needy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: A wife of noble character, who can find? She is far more precious than rubies.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: The heart of her husband trusts in her, and he lacks nothing of value.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She brings him good and not harm all the days of her life.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She selects wool and flax and works with eager hands.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She is like the merchant ships, bringing her food from afar.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She rises while it is still night to provide food for her household and portions for her maidservants.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She appraises a field and buys it; from her earnings she plants a vineyard.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She girds herself with strength and shows that her arms are strong.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She sees that her gain is good, and her lamp is not extinguished at night.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She stretches out her hands to the distaff and grasps the spindle with her fingers.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She opens her arms to the poor and reaches out her hands to the needy.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: When it snows, she has no fear for her household, for they are all clothed in scarlet.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She makes coverings for her bed; her clothing is fine linen and purple.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Her husband is known at the city gate, where he sits among the elders of the land.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She makes linen garments and sells them; she delivers sashes to the merchants.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Strength and honor are her clothing, and she can laugh at the days to come.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She opens her mouth with wisdom, and faithful instruction is on her tongue.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: She watches over the affairs of her household and does not eat the bread of idleness.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Her children rise up and call her blessed; her husband praises her as well:
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: “Many daughters have done noble things, but you surpass them all!”
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Charm is deceptive and beauty is fleeting, but a woman who fears the LORD is to be praised.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com

translations.name: Berean Standard Bible
translations.text: Give her the fruit of her hands, and let her works praise her at the gates.
translations.license: Free for any use (Berean Standard Bible 2022) — bereanbible.com
